CREATE TABLE test_decimals (id UInt32, value Decimal64(5));
SELECT id, value, countDigits(value) FROM test_decimals;
SELECT countDigits(toDecimal32(0, 0)) AS count_zero, countDigits(toDecimal32(-123.00, 2)) AS count_negative_with_scale;
WITH (SELECT countDigits(0.0001) AS count_subquery) AS temp SELECT count_subquery;
CREATE TABLE decimals_temp AS SELECT id, value FROM test_decimals WHERE value < 0;
SELECT d.id, countDigits(d.value * 1000) FROM decimals_temp AS d INNER JOIN test_decimals AS t ON d.id = t.id;
